title: Odisha Weather Warning: 45°C Heatwave Triggers Mass Death of Cattle & Fish! - Kanak News Odisha
full_text:
From scorching 45°C temperatures to mysterious cattle deaths, the state is reeling under an unprecedented heatwave!
Odisha is literally burning. While the western districts battle relentless heatwaves, the coastal regions are suffocating under extreme humidity. But the situation has taken a dark turn in Kendrapara’s Aali block, where over 60 cows have died mysteriously, leaving farmers in a state of panic. As health teams rush to investigate, another disaster has emerged in Jeypore, where hundreds of fish have died in Khajuribandha pond due to the unbearable temperature.
